name: find_file
description: Search for files by name pattern within a directory. Supports wildcards like *.pdf or report*. Returns full absolute paths.

path.description: Directory to search in. Can be absolute (/Users/name/Desktop) or relative to home (Desktop/Files). Defaults to home directory.

pattern.description: Filename pattern to search for. Example: *.pdf, report*, notes.txt. Use * for all files.
